name: Χρυσά Κορίτσια
overview: The Golden Girls is a Greek comedy television series , produced in 2007-2009, which is the adaptation of the American television series The Golden Girls ( The Golden Girls ) to the Greek standards and was broadcast by the television station ET1 from January 9, 2008 to March 10, 2009. [ 1 ] The transfer of the script to the Greek standards is supervised by Katerina Bey while the direction was undertaken by Fotini Kotrotsi. [
